description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named testit that runs in the default stage. The job executes three shell commands: echo "*** test ci_buil_token API access ***", then curl -H "JOB_TOKEN: $CI_BUILD_TOKEN" "https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/2828837/repository/tags", and finally echo -e "\n DONE \n". No specific Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined, and it relies on the built‑in CI_BUILD_TOKEN secret.
